meaning: vbl.underpay过去式及过去分词adj.所得报酬过低的
examples: Women are frequently underpaid for the work that they do.
Yes, I know you’re all underpaid.
They are not only all young and good, but also underpaid.
Roswyn Hakesley-Brown, president of the RCN told the congress that nurses felt" undervalued and underpaid".
And one of the few underpaid Mets stars in the history of this spendthrift franchise.
